songs.title: Before the Lobotomy
feed: “Before the Lobotomy” by Green Day reaches #1 in the Personal Hot 100 for the first time.
“Before the Lobotomy” by Green Day reaches a new peak in Personal Hot 100, rising 1 spot to #1.
“Before the Lobotomy” by Green Day is the #1 best selling song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 105 sales units.
“Before the Lobotomy” by Green Day is the #1 most streamed song in Personal Hot 100 this week with 175 streams units.
“Before the Lobotomy” by Green Day is the #1 overall units gainer in Personal Hot 100 this week with 397,488 total units.
